title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Spiral Review
summary: Operate a reusable repository template without letting gates rot or overwhelm contributors. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a reusable quality-gated repository template after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure defect escape, false positives, duration, flakiness, suppression age, and developer friction.
Schedule compatibility-tested tool and runtime upgrades with rollback paths.
Raise standards gradually with changed-code gates and expiring debt records.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.
